findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in get_config_value
findings.description: find_config returns NULL for missing key, then cfg->value is dereferenced without NULL check

findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in print_config_length
findings.description: find_config returns NULL for missing key, then cfg->value is passed to strlen without NULL check

findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in merge_values
findings.description: Two find_config calls can each return NULL, both dereferenced in strlen and snprintf without checks

findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in load_from_input via parse_line error
findings.description: parse_line returns NULL key and value on malformed input, passed to printf and add_config without error checking

findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in export_configs after allocation failure
findings.description: Buffer set to NULL on realloc failure then passed to printf, and initial malloc failure not checked before use
